days.summary: ByteDance Seed surfaced the clearest product artifact of the day with Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena and a new Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM aimed at real-time conversational interaction. On the research side, LMGenDrive proposed an end-to-end driving stack that combines multimodal understanding with generative world modeling for long-tail autonomy, while the paper "Large Language Models Generate Harmful Content Using a Distinct, Unified Mechanism" argues harmful generation may arise from a single internal mechanism with implications for alignment and jailbreak defense.
